page_title: Visitor record: Travelling outside Canada - Canada.ca

h3: Arriving in Canada by bus, train or boat (including a cruise ship)

sections.heading: Visa-required travellers
items: You need a valid visitor visa every time you want to enter Canada, unless you’re returning directly from a visit to the United States or Saint Pierre and Miquelon.
If you’re not sure if you’re a visa-required traveller, find out if you need a visa .

sections.heading: Students and workers
items: You can apply for a new visitor visa from within Canada if you meet all the conditions below:
Apply for a visitor visa from within Canada .
bullets: You already hold a valid study or work permit.
You want to leave and return to Canada .
Your existing visitor visa is expired or was valid for only one entry.

sections.heading: Visa-exempt travellers
items: The documents you need to re-enter Canada depend on how you’ll travel to Canada.

sections.heading: Arriving in Canada by bus, train or boat (including a cruise ship)
US citizens
items: You normally need a valid passport or travel document.
NEXUS members can use their membership card when they fly to a Canadian airport or arrive by car, train, bus or boat.
FAST members can use their membership card when travelling by car, train, bus or boat only.
For more information, visit the Canada Border Services Agency website .
